Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC103 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Honey Bee (Psytronik - 2016).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0a00 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Honey Bee (Psytronik - 2016).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0900 which:
1. Sets up the correct VICII settings to display the loading screen 2. Initialises the loading music by calling the routine at $1000 (important: accumulator should be set to zero for music to initialise correctly)
Note: although the entry point is $C103, the game should be dumped when a breakpoint at $C13A is hit. This allows the LDA $0200,X instruction at $C12F to be changed to LDA $C200,X as the data for the press space sprite is already at $C200 and allows the dump to start at $0400.
